name: Mandiant Threat Intelligence
description: Integrate with the Mandiant Threat Intelligence API v4 to search indicators, threat actors, malware families, campaigns, and vulnerability intelligence

auth_config.note: Obtain bearer token via POST to /token with API key ID and secret key using x-www-form-urlencoded grant_type=client_credentials

actions.name: Lookup Indicator
actions.description: Search for an indicator of compromise (IP, domain, URL, or hash) in Mandiant threat intelligence

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Indicator type: ipv4, fqdn, url, md5, sha1, sha256

actions.name: Search Indicators
actions.description: Search Mandiant indicator database with filters for type, confidence, and date ranges

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 25, max 1000)

actions.name: Lookup Threat Actor
actions.description: Retrieve detailed intelligence on a threat actor by name (e.g., APT29, UNC3782)

parameters.name: actor_name
parameters.description: Threat actor name to look up (3-30 characters, e.g. apt43, UNC3782)

actions.name: Lookup Malware Family
actions.description: Retrieve intelligence on a malware family including capabilities, associated actors, and indicators

parameters.name: malware_name
parameters.description: Malware family name to look up

actions.name: Lookup Vulnerability
actions.description: Retrieve Mandiant vulnerability intelligence for a CVE including exploitation status and risk rating

parameters.name: cve_id
parameters.description: CVE ID to look up (e.g. CVE-2021-44228)

actions.name: Lookup Campaign
actions.description: Retrieve intelligence on a Mandiant-tracked threat campaign

parameters.name: campaign_id
parameters.description: Mandiant campaign ID to look up

actions.name: List Reports
actions.description: Retrieve a list of Mandiant intelligence reports with optional filters

actions.name: Search Mandiant
actions.description: Full-text search across Mandiant threat intelligence data including actors, malware, campaigns, and reports

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Entity type filter (indicator, actor, malware, vulnerability, campaign, report)
